comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Phase 0 is complete. tau-yimj is closed with new regression suites in extensions/tau/test/ralph-{store,service,adapter}.test.ts plus the existing fresh-session helper coverage. Verified with targeted Ralph tests and `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`; review loop result was spec PASS and quality APPROVED. Next active task is tau-jsvt for strict Schema-backed Ralph domain models and typed errors. Follow-up bug tau-xvkb tracks the archive basename prefix edge case discovered during freeze-pass testing.
